Doctor of Medicine — An-Najah National University

I am a Medical Doctor and Healthcare Business Intelligence Analyst with 3+ years of experience transforming complex healthcare data into actionable insights through analytics, BI, and enterprise reporting.

My work focuses on Power BI dashboards, healthcare quality indicators, KPI frameworks, and scalable reporting solutions that support strategic planning, operational excellence, and quality improvement across hospital systems and non-profit organizations.

My medical background helps me understand the real meaning behind healthcare data: clinical workflows, hospital information systems, ICD-10, quality indicators, and the operational context behind each metric.

I am certified as a Certified Health Data Analyst (CHDA) and Microsoft Certified Power BI Data Analyst (PL-300), with hands-on experience in Power BI, SQL, Python, DAX, HIS/EHR systems, ETL, data validation, and data governance.

Career

Experience

Feb 2026 – Present · Taawon (Welfare Association), Ramallah

Reporting Management Officer

  • Develop Power BI dashboards for executive reporting and KPI monitoring across multiple business functions.
  • Analyze CRM and operational data to support reporting, performance monitoring, and decision-making.
  • Perform data validation and reporting automation to improve data quality and reporting efficiency.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver accurate and timely analytical reports.
Mar 2025 – Feb 2026 · Arab Hospitals Group, Ramallah

Data Analysis Lead

  • Led data reporting across three hospitals, delivering monthly and quarterly executive and board-level performance reports.
  • Designed Power BI dashboards for operational, financial, clinical, physician performance, and healthcare quality KPIs.
  • Built automated reporting solutions by extracting, transforming, and validating data from multiple HIS systems.
  • Standardized KPI definitions, reporting methodologies, and data governance practices.
Apr 2023 – Mar 2025 · Istishari Arab Hospital, Ramallah

Data Analyst

  • Designed interactive Power BI dashboards for clinical, operational, financial, and quality performance reporting.
  • Implemented clinical registries across multiple specialties to support standardized healthcare data collection and outcome monitoring.
  • Developed data dictionaries, collection tools, documentation standards, and KPI frameworks.
  • Extracted, transformed, and validated healthcare data from HIS and financial systems using SQL and ETL processes.
2022 – 2023 · AXSOS Academy / Coding Dojo, Ramallah

Software Development Intern

Completed full-stack software development training covering web fundamentals, Python, SQL, JavaScript, REST APIs, Git, algorithms, and project-based development.

Selected Work

Dashboard Portfolio

A visual sample of healthcare BI dashboards and quality indicator analytics. These examples focus on dashboard design, KPI methodology, analytical thinking, and reporting structure.

Confidentiality note: All dashboard screenshots use anonymized, fictional, or manipulated data and branding. They are included only to demonstrate dashboard design, analytics capabilities, KPI logic, and reporting techniques while protecting organizational confidentiality.

QUALITY ANALYTICS · POWER BI

Healthcare Quality Indicators Suite

End-to-end dashboard suite for monitoring hospital quality indicators using anonymized sample data. Includes KPI definitions, benchmark logic, trend analysis, executive cards, drill-down tables, and performance scoring.

Power BIDAXSQLPower QueryKPI Frameworks

CLINICAL QUALITY · SURGERY

Surgical Outcomes Dashboard

Interactive dashboard tracking re-operation and reopen rates by quarter and surgical specialty. Built to support quality review meetings, internal benchmarking, and specialty-level performance monitoring.

Power BIDAXQuality IndicatorsBenchmarking

POPULATION HEALTH · OUTPATIENT KPIS

Diabetes Care Quality Dashboard

Dashboard monitoring HbA1c testing volume, average results, poor glycemic control, compliance percentage, and quarterly performance trends using anonymized outpatient data.

Power BIDAXHealthcare KPIsData Validation

OPERATIONS ANALYTICS · RADIOLOGY

Radiology Turnaround Time Dashboard

Operational dashboard measuring radiology report turnaround time, order volumes, compliance against benchmark, and modality-level performance for CT, MRI, ultrasound, and fluoroscopy.

Power BISQLTAT AnalysisCompliance

LAB QUALITY · MICROBIOLOGY

Microbiology TAT Compliance Dashboard

Quality dashboard analyzing microbiology turnaround time by test category, benchmark compliance, quarterly trends, and detailed operational tables for lab performance management.

Power BIDAXLab AnalyticsBenchmarks

LAB OPERATIONS · ENTERPRISE REPORTING

Laboratory Turnaround Time Dashboard
